verses.text: Tu-in milim biakna sa tawh kisai thu panin: Amaute in, “Ka thei uh hi,” a cih mah bangin eite khempeuh in theihna i neih ciatna thu i thei hi. Tua bang theihna in mite kisatheisak a, ahi zongin itna in mite kipsak hi
Mi khat in thu a thei-in a kingaihsut leh a taktakin a theihdingin a kilawmzah a thei nailo ahi hi
Mi khat in Pasian a it leh Pasian in tua mipa a na thei hi
Tua ahih manin biakna sa tawh kisai thu panin: Milim i cih pen bangmah a omlopi khat lim dingin a kibawl na hi a, Pasian khat bek a om ahihna thu i theih ciat ahi hi
Leitung leh vantungah pasian leh topa a kici tampi a om ahi zongin

eite-a' dingin Pasian khat bek, Pa khat bek a om hi. Ama-a' dingin i nuntaknapa, na khempeuh a piangsakpa ahi hi. Eite tungah nuntakna a hong pia, na khempeuh a piangsak Topa Jesuh Khrih khat bek a om hi

Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in hih thu theikimlo uh hi. Mi pawlkhatte, milim biakna thu-ah kingeinaseh lua khin uh ahih manin tuhun mahmahin zong biakna sate a nek uh ciangin tua milim tawh kisai sa mahin ngaihsunsun lai uh hi. Amaute lungsim thaneem uh ahih manin tua sate a nek uh ciangin a zehphi mahin kingaihsun uh hi
Ahi zongin tua i nek ante in Pasian tawh i kizopna hong hoihsak tuanlo hi. I nekloh hangin siatna om tuanlo a, i nek hangin zong phatna om tuan samlo hi
Ahi zongin note' utbangin gamtat theihna ding thu na neihna uh hangin upna a neu laite a puksak na suahkhak lohna dingun hoihtakin kidawm un

No thuthei-a a kineite, milim biakna inn sungah milim biakna sa na neklam uh, hih thu tawh kisai-ah a lungsim hatzo nailote in hong mukha zenzen leh milim biakna sa nek ding a hanthawn na suakkha ding uh hi
Tua ahih manin note' thutheihna hangin, Khrih in sihna a thuakpih, thu upna sungah i sanggamte a siasak na suak ding uh hi
Tua bangin lungsim thaneemte gimsakin, thu upna sungah na sanggamte uh tungah na khialh uh ciangin Khrih tung mahmahah a khial na hi uh hi
Tua ahih manin nekna in thu upna sungah ka sanggamte khat a khialsak ding ahih leh, amah a pukkhak lohna dingin milim biakna sa ka ne ngei het kei ding hi.
